name: InPost Shipping / ShipX
summary: Planned InPost connector for shipment creation, tracking and label retrieval in marketplace fulfillment pilots.
description: Added because Marketing maps marketplace -> courier and fulfillment as a concrete monetization path after order synchronization. InPost documents Shipping/ShipX APIs for creating shipments, retrieving shipment details, labels and tracking, with OAuth-based access. This connector should be implemented after a pilot customer confirms courier workflow scope and provides an organization account.
useCases: Create a shipment after a BaseLinker order is validated.
Download a label and attach it to an audited fulfillment task.
Alert operators when tracking status stalls or shipment creation fails.
